name: slopshield
description: Chrome extension that redacts LinkedIn slop with a censor bar and a snarky stamp. Detects the dialect, not the AI.

scripts.package: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -rq dist/slopshield-$npm_package_version.zip manifest.json content popup background icons LICENSE -x '*.DS_Store' && unzip -l dist/slopshield-$npm_package_version.zip
